name: Peanut Butter Cookies Bw
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Cream together the peanut butter and vegetable oil in a bowl. Add brown sugar, vanilla, and egg. Beat well.
Add flour (reserve 1-2 cups) and baking soda. Blend thoroughly. Add enough extra flour so that you can shape dough into balls and place on an ungreased baking sheet. Can be made as 36 medium (my choice) or 48 small cookies.
Flatten with a fork, bake about 10-15 minutes or until lightly browned.
1/24 recipe = 6 calories, 1 starch/bread + 1 fat exchange, 2 grams protein, 13 grams carbohydrate, 4 grams fat, 89 mg sodium
Adapted from Quick & Easy Diabetic Menus by Betty Wedman, 1993. Shared and tested by Elizabeth Rodier, Feb 94
